scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.build:deploy: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run build && pnpm run install:python
scripts.install:python: python3 -m pip install --upgrade pip && python3 -m pip install --target=./.python_packages -r requirements.txt && python3 -c "import sys; sys.path.insert(0, './.python_packages'); from ortools.sat.python import cp_model; print('ortools OK')"
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
